name: detectors: exhaustive-unions.sh exits 1 when a discriminated-union switch lacks an assertNever exit per g-ts-003
command: mkdir -p src && printf "type T = {k:\"a\"}|{k:\"b\"};function f(t:T){switch(t.k){case \"a\":return 1;}}\n" > src/a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/exhaustive-unions.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.ts"
